data.title: Tennessee Considers Bitcoin Investment for Public Funds
data.description: Tennessee lawmakers are evaluating a proposed bill that would permit the state to allocate up to 10% of specific public funds into bitcoin as a safeguard against inflation. According to NS3.AI, the bill outlines stringent custody and transparency protocols and requires regular reporting on bitcoin holdings and their performance. If enacted, Tennessee would align with several other U.S. states that are exploring or implementing similar strategies to incorporate bitcoin into public financial reserves.

data.title: Gold Is the Real Bubble, Says Ark Invest's Cathie Wood—Not AI
data.description:
Tech investor Cathie Wood isn't worried about an AI bubble, instead singling out gold as the real ongoing asset bubble.
source: https://decrypt.co/356505/gold-real-bubble-not-ai-ark-invest-cathie-wood

data.title: Tether Reports $10 Billion Profit and Record U.S. Treasury Holdings
data.description: Tether has announced a profit of $10 billion over the past year, highlighting its robust financial performance. According to NS3.AI, the company also holds $6.3 billion in excess reserves, underscoring its strong liquidity position. Tether's U.S. Treasury holdings have reached a record $141 billion, reflecting its increased emphasis on secure assets to back its stablecoin operations.

data.title: European Commission calls on 12 countries to implement crypto tax rules
data.description:
The commission also singled out Hungary for failing to comply with the EU's MiCA framework after an amendment to a local law.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/european-commission-countries-crypto-tax-rules?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Cathie Wood Asserts Gold, Not AI, Is the Real Market Bubble
data.description: Cathie Wood of Ark Invest has expressed her belief that gold, rather than artificial intelligence, represents the true market bubble. According to NS3.AI, gold recently reached an all-time high before experiencing a nearly 9% decline, while silver saw a drop of over 27%. Wood advocates for Bitcoin as a scarce asset, emphasizing its fixed supply. She dismisses concerns of an AI bubble akin to the tech crash of the early 2000s.

data.title: CryptoQuant: Short-Term Holders Send 35,100 BTC to Exchanges at a Loss
data.description:
On-chain data from CryptoQuant shows that short-term Bitcoin holders transferred 35,100 BTC to exchanges at a loss within 24 hours, pointing to stress-driven behavior.

The post CryptoQuant: Short-Term Holders Send 35,100 BTC to Exchanges at a Loss first appeared on Crypto News And Market Updates | BTCUSA.

source: https://btcusa.com/cryptoquant-short-term-holders-send-35100-btc-to-exchanges-at-a-loss/

data.description:

data.title: AI Data Centers in the U.S. Encounter Local Resistance Over Environmental Concerns
data.description: The rapid expansion of AI data centers across the United States is facing growing local opposition due to concerns about electricity usage, water consumption, and environmental impact. According to NS3.AI, a report from Brookings suggests implementing legally binding community benefit agreements to address these issues and ensure community satisfaction. Failure to resolve these disputes could significantly hinder the growth of AI infrastructure and its associated economic benefits.

data.title: Silver’s Historic Crash Sends Shockwaves Across Crypto and Macro Markets – Here Is Why It Matters
data.description:
The recent and unprecedented crash of silver prices has sent shockwaves rippling through both the cryptocurrency market and the broader macroeconomic landscape, prompting intense scrutiny and concern among investors and analysts alike. This development is significant for several reasons, including its potential to influence market confidence, alter investment strategies, and reshape the dynamics of asset correlations in an increasingly volatile economic environment. Understanding the implications of this event is crucial for stakeholders navigating the intricate interplay between precious metals, digital currencies, and global economic trends.
source: https://blocknews.com/silvers-historic-crash-sends-shockwaves-across-crypto-and-macro-markets-here-is-why-it-matters/

data.title: Silver Is Trading Like a Shortage Story – Bitcoin Like a Macro Beta Trade
